_meta.purpose: Extension D hand-curated Open Dental mapping. Consumed by praxis_deid/extractors/d_*.py to produce payments_raw.csv at de-id time. Derived from expected_mapping_open_dental.json + expert audit. DO NOT regenerate from the wizard — the wizard's output is 78% reliable per the Wizard-1 validation gate (commit 6b19ae9). Hand-edits to this file MUST cite the Open Dental manual page they are based on.

source_id.notes: Each payment may have multiple splits; the canonical row is at split-grain.

payment_source.notes: Need UNION ALL with claimpayment (insurance) and adjustment (writeoff) tables. This mapping covers patient payments only. Operator should review the full UNION expression.

payer_category.notes: Patient-paid splits are 'self_pay' by definition. Insurance splits would map differently (via UNION'd claimpayment branch).

notes: Full Extension D coverage requires UNION ALL of paysplit (patient), claimpayment (insurance), and adjustment (writeoff). The mapping above only covers the patient branch.
